reviews.comment:
Me tuve que ir de tanto esperar en el surtidor a que me atiendan, no solo qu se mueven en camaralenta los pibes sino que priorizaron la atencion a motos que entraban en contramano a la estacion. Hoy a las 13:45 hs

(Translated by Google)
I had to leave because I'd been waiting so long at the pump to be served. Not only were the staff moving at a snail's pace, but they were prioritizing motorcycles that were entering the station the wrong way. Today at 1:45 PM

reviewReply.comment: Facundo lamentamos tu mala experiencia, haremos los ajustes necesarios para corregir estas situaciones
